description_long: This is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a dual-tone design featuring a white upper section and a gold lower section. The cistern is rectangular with a visible flush button on top and is adorned with a decorative Greek key border and a central mandala motif. The toilet seat and lid are white, matching the upper body, and the seat is slightly raised above the bowl. The bowl itself is rounded and smoothly transitions into the base, which is predominantly gold with a white accent on the sides. The rear view reveals an open section for plumbing connections, and the overall form is sleek with clean lines. The surface appears glossy and hard, typical of ceramic toilets, and the design is both functional and visually striking.
description: A stylish, floor-mounted toilet with a white and gold color scheme, decorative motifs, and a visible flush button. The design is sleek, modern, and features a glossy ceramic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative mandala motif, Greek key border, and the full seat and lid in white atop a gold base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth transition between the white upper and gold lower sections, with the seat partially open.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the exposed plumbing cutout and the rectangular cistern with a gold top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat partially open and the gold and white color split.
